title: Company Data Enricher Input
description: Enrich company information from domains or search by company name

domains.title: Company Domains
domains.description: List of company domains to enrich (e.g. 'stripe.com', 'shopify.com'). Returns metadata, social links, contact info, tech stack, and RDAP domain info.

queries.title: Company Name Search Queries
queries.description: List of company names to search via Wikidata (e.g. 'Google', 'Apple Inc'). Returns Wikidata entities matching the query.

wikidataIds.title: Wikidata Entity IDs
wikidataIds.description: List of Wikidata entity IDs to look up (e.g. 'Q95' for Google, 'Q312' for Apple). Returns structured company info from Wikidata.

mode.title: Enrichment Mode
mode.description: For domain inputs: 'enrich' returns full enrichment (metadata + tech + social + contacts + RDAP). 'domain' returns basic metadata + RDAP without tech detection.
enumTitles: Full Enrichment (metadata + tech stack + social + contacts + RDAP)
Domain Lookup (metadata + RDAP, no tech detection)

delayMs.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayMs.description: Milliseconds to wait between each domain/query to avoid overloading target sites.
